description_long: This property features a two-story main house with a light-colored exterior and a metal gable roof, complemented by a detached, single-story garage or guest house with a darker shingled roof. The main house is surrounded by a paved driveway and walkways, with a front porch supported by columns and a symmetrical arrangement of windows. The landscaping includes numerous evenly spaced trees encircling the property, providing a sense of privacy and greenery. The driveway leads from the street to the garage, passing by a small garden bed. The overall layout is orderly and suburban, with clear separation between the main living space and the auxiliary structure.
description: A two-story light-colored house with a metal gable roof, front porch, and detached dark-roofed garage, surrounded by trees and paved walkways.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and side of the main house, the detached garage, and the tree-lined driveway leading to the property.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the main house, the garage, and the surrounding trees, with the driveway and garden bed visible.
description_view_2: View 2 presents a direct front view of the house, showcasing the porch, symmetrical windows, and the main entrance, with the garage in the background.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the back of the property, focusing on the rear facades of both the main house and the garage, as well as the landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, supported by columns and accessed by a short set of steps.
